title: jasminum longitubum
intro: Jasminum longitubum, also known as the tubular jasmine or Thai jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Jasminum longitubum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Jasminum longitubum is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
